work_items.summary: Full baseline performance audit of the paper trading system. Computed win rate, P&L curve, drawdown, aggregate score IC, and documented the per-dimension IC data gap.
critical_data_gaps: signals_log.jsonl does not exist — per-dimension scores not logged at trade time
Per-dimension IC (TREND, MOMENTUM, SQUEEZE, FLOW, BREAKOUT, CONFLUENCE, NEWS, SOCIAL, REVERSION) not computable
5-day forward IC not computable — parquet data too recent and most symbols missing daily files
equity_history.json is stale — only covers 2026-03-23 to 2026-03-24
work_items.verdict: NO-GO for adding signal complexity. System has zero demonstrated edge. Returns driven entirely by 2 outlier trades (NAVN, KOD). N=13 agent trades is statistically meaningless.

priority_actions.action: Add per-dimension score logging to every trade in trades.json
priority_actions.why: Cannot compute dimension IC without this. This is the most urgent data infrastructure gap.

priority_actions.action: Continue running paper system for 30+ days to accumulate N>=200 agent trades
priority_actions.why: Phase 1 exit criteria. Current: 13 agent trades, target: 200.

priority_actions.action: Fix equity_history.json staleness — stopped updating after 2026-03-24
priority_actions.why: No live equity curve for Chief Decifer monitoring.

priority_actions.action: Audit NAVN trade — $69,676 win from score-38 entry needs position-sizing review
priority_actions.why: Result may indicate a position sizing bug rather than signal edge.

priority_actions.action: Add a 'source' field to exit records distinguishing system exits from manual Amit closes
priority_actions.why: agent_sell conflates both. Cannot evaluate autonomous exit logic without clean separation.

notes: Pending Amit approval before commit. baseline_performance.md is in the repo root as requested. No code was changed — this is a read-only audit session.
